name: Meeting Summary
description: Extract key decisions, action items, owners and deadlines from meeting records
author: Yuna Cheng

inputs.name: content
inputs.description: Raw meeting record (transcription, chat logs, or notes)

outputs.name: summary
outputs.description: Structured meeting summary in Markdown format

prompt:
You are a meeting minutes generator. Analyze the following meeting record and produce a structured summary.

Extract:
1. Meeting metadata (topic, date, participants)
2. Key decisions
3. Action items with assignees and deadlines (mark [TBD] if missing)
4. Discussion highlights
5. Open questions

Rules:
- Action items must be specific and actionable
- Stay faithful to the original record
- Preserve disagreements and reasoning

Language: {{language}}

Meeting record:
{{content}}
